title: Marvelously Optimized
description: Marvelously Optimized is a Modpack That only Focus on Optimization
body:
# Marvelously Optimized
Marvelously Optimized is a modpack focused exclusively on performance and optimization. It supports all major optimization mods and works across multiple mod loaders. **Make sure to Disable 
vsync and Set FPS to Unlimited**
## Supported Loaders

- Fabric (Recommended)
- Quilt (Recommended)
- NeoForge
- Forge (Not Recommended)

### Why is Fabric Recommended Over Forge
Fabric supports the largest selection of performance-enhancing mods, while Forge has very limited optimization support. Quilt is also highly recommended, offering compatibility with most Fabric mods and additional improvements.

<details>
<summary>How to Download</summary>

## easiest way to Download
  
### Modrinth App

**How to download the Modrinth App**
1. Click the button at the top of your screen "Get Modrinth App"
2. Click "Download The Modrinth App"
3. Open the file
4. Click "Yes"
5. Click "Next" until you see "Finish"
9. Click "Finish"

The app Has Been DownLoaded Now Download The Modpack

**How To Download The Modpack**
1. at the top Left of Your Screen Click the Compass icon
2. Click on The "Modpack" Tab
3. Search "Marvelously Optimized"
4. Click Install
5. Click on The Icon on the Left Side of Your Screen
6. Click Play

**your Done**

</details>

Included Mods is for fabric not all of theres mods are in the other modpacks but most are
